title: The Eschatrilogy: Book of the Dead
original_title: The Eschatrilogy: Book of the Dead
overview: A dark figure appears in the night, bringing with him a virus that turns people into monsters. Hoping to gather stories to take back with him to the other side, he meets his opposite, a light figure prepared to do battle with the dark man in order to save the human race...
